inputs.text: Bachha bukhar aur thakan mahsoos kar raha hai, 5 saal ka hai, bahut rota hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough is a common symptom of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: No specific symptoms of tuberculosis are present yet

inputs.text: Bachha ki khansi shuru ho gayi hai, sookhi khansi hai, bukhar bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent dry cough is a common symptom of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever is still present, but cough has become more prominent

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: No specific symptoms of tuberculosis are present yet

inputs.text: Bachha ki khansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai, raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Cough for more than 2 weeks, night sweats, and weight loss are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bronchitis is less likely due to the presence of night sweats and weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia is less likely due to the chronic nature of symptoms

inputs.text: Bachha ki halat bigad rahi hai, kamzori mahsoos ho rahi hai, balgam mein khoon bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and blood in sputum confirm the diagnosis of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of severe symptoms and blood in sputum

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the chronic nature of symptoms and presence of blood in sputum
